title: Fiduciary: an evaluation framework for whether enterprise AI systems meet the governance obligations required for deployment in regulated environments
description: Fiduciary drops a language model into a synthetic regulated bank as an employee, gives it tasks under real policy, and audits whether its behavior would survive legal, compliance, risk, and audit sign-off. Layered evaluation: deterministic checks, rubric-anchored multi-model judges, and a human-agreement reliability study.
